ns0:entry.ns0:title: AgentWrapper/agent-orchestrator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AgentWrapper/agent-orchestrator
Language: go
Agentic orchestrator for parallel coding agents — plans tasks, spawns agents, and autonomously handles CI fixes, merge conflicts, and code reviews.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asciimoo/hister
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asciimoo/hister
Language: go
Your own search engine

ns0:entry.ns0:title: avelino/awesome-go

Language: go
A curated list of awesome Go frameworks, libraries and software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ethereum/go-ethereum
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum
Language: go
Go implementation of the Ethereum protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fatedier/frp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fatedier/frp
Language: go
A fast reverse proxy to help you expose a local server behind a NAT or firewall to the internet.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gastownhall/gastown
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/gastown
Language: go
Gas Town - multi-agent workspace manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: getarcaneapp/arcane
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/getarcaneapp/arcane
Language: go
Modern Docker Management, Designed for Everyone

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gin-gonic/gin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gin-gonic/gin
Language: go
Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: golang/go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/golang/go
Language: go
The Go programming language

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/adk-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/adk-go
Language: go
An open-source, code-first Go toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform
Language: go
Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: infiniflow/ragflow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/infiniflow/ragflow
Language: go
RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: junegunn/fzf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/junegunn/fzf
Language: go
🌸 A command-line fuzzy finder

Language: go
Production-Grade Container Scheduling and Management

Language: go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netbirdio/netbird

Language: go
Connect your devices into a secure WireGuard®-based overlay network with SSO, MFA and granular access controls.

Language: go
The Prometheus monitoring system and time series database.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: workweave/router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/workweave/router
Language: go
Model router for agentic systems. Routes every prompt to the right model in <50ms. Cut costs 40-70% with just an endpoint change.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
